name: Validation events → ES (Phase 3 validation route)
description: Route validation events directly to ES validation index

name: Sysmon events → sysmon_normalize
description: Route Sysmon events to dedicated normalization pipeline

name: Windows Security events → windows_security_normalize
description: Route Windows Security events to dedicated normalization pipeline

name: Linux audit events → linux_auditd_normalize
description: Route Linux auditd events to dedicated normalization pipeline

name: CloudTrail events → cloudtrail_normalize
description: Route AWS CloudTrail events to dedicated normalization pipeline

name: Zeek events → zeek_normalize
description: Route Zeek log events to dedicated normalization pipeline

name: Unrecognized events → passthrough
description: Catch-all: pass unrecognized events through unchanged
